mapper.select: SELECT notice_no ,notice_name ,notice_hit ,notice_date ,notice_comment_writer ,notice_comment_date ,notice_comment_content FROM study.tbl_notice WHERE notice_no > 0 ORDER BY notice_no DESC

SELECT notice_no ,notice_name ,notice_hit ,DATE_FORMAT(notice_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as notice_date ,notice_comment_writer ,notice_comment_date ,notice_comment_content FROM study.tbl_notice
WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study.tbl_notice ( notice_name, notice_comment_writer, notice_comment_content, notice_hit )VALUES( #{noticeName}, #{noticeCommentWriter}, #{noticeCommentContent}, 0 )
